summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Publications/Blog Section feature. All backend API endpoints working correctly and all frontend flows functional. Tag filtering, article view, and navigation work as expected.

issues: Inline markdown bold syntax (**text**) within list items and paragraphs renders as literal text instead of bold - content remains readable but formatting not applied

passed_tests: GET /api/publications - Returns list of 3 seed publications (12/12 pytest tests passed)
GET /api/publications/{id} - Returns single publication with full content
GET /api/publications/tags/all - Returns all unique tags (9 tags)
Publications list page displays all publications with tags and dates
Tag filtering UI works - clicking tag filters the list
Clicking publication opens full article view
Back to Publications link returns to the list
critical_code_review_comments: Inline markdown rendering (bold text within list items) not implemented in article view - low priority enhancement
context_for_next_testing_agent: Publications feature fully implemented and tested. Backend returns seed data when database is empty. Admin-only endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE) require Google auth with admin role. The PublicationEditor component for admin users exists but requires authentication to test.
